'''âw-dh-t''' ('''kawadhat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yerk|yerk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-dh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yerk|yerk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-dh-t
|-
! Lemma
| kawadhat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwadhat|thiwadhat]] || [[word:jiwadhat|jiwadhat]] || [[word:shiwadhat|shiwadhat]] || [[word:kiwadhat|kiwadhat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwadhat|thuthuwadhat]] || [[word:jujuwadhat|jujuwadhat]] || [[word:shushuwadhat|shushuwadhat]] || [[word:kukuwadhat|kukuwadhat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwadhat|thuwadhat]] || [[word:juwadhat|juwadhat]] || [[word:shuwadhat|shuwadhat]] || [[word:kuwadhat|kuwadhat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwadhat|thuwadhat]] || [[word:juwadhat|juwadhat]] || [[word:shuwadhat|shuwadhat]] || [[word:kuwadhat|kuwadhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewadhat|thewadhat]] || [[word:jewadhat|jewadhat]] || [[word:shewadhat|shewadhat]] || [[word:kewadhat|kewadhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowadhat|thothowadhat]] || [[word:jojowadhat|jojowadhat]] || [[word:shoshowadhat|shoshowadhat]] || [[word:kokowadhat|kokowadhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowadhat|thowadhat]] || [[word:jowadhat|jowadhat]] || [[word:showadhat|showadhat]] || [[word:kowadhat|kowadhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowadhat|thowadhat]] || [[word:jowadhat|jowadhat]] || [[word:showadhat|showadhat]] || [[word:kowadhat|kowadhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwadhat|thĂŠwadhat]] || [[word:jĂŠwadhat|jĂŠwadhat]] || [[word:shĂŠwadhat|shĂŠwadhat]] || [[word:kĂŠwadhat|kĂŠwadhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawadhat|thathawadhat]] || [[word:jajawadhat|jajawadhat]] || [[word:shashawadhat|shashawadhat]] || [[word:kakawadhat|kakawadhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawadhat|thawadhat]] || [[word:jawadhat|jawadhat]] || [[word:shawadhat|shawadhat]] || [[word:kawadhat|kawadhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawadhat|thawadhat]] || [[word:jawadhat|jawadhat]] || [[word:shawadhat|shawadhat]] || [[word:kawadhat|kawadhat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawadhat|shawadhat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawadhat|goshawadhat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawadhat|gokishawadhat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawadhatnĂŒ|shawadhatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawadhatnknĂŒ|goshawadhatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawadhatnĂŒ|gokishawadhatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawadhatshĂ«|shawadhatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawadhatnkshĂ«|goshawadhatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawadhatshĂ«|gokishawadhatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawadhatro|shawadhatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawadhatnkro|goshawadhatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawadhatro|gokishawadhatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawadhatmu|shawadhatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawadhatnkmu|goshawadhatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawadhatmu|gokishawadhatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawadhatsher|shawadhatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawadhatnksher|goshawadhatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawadhatsher|gokishawadhatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawadhatng|shawadhatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawadhatnkng|goshawadhatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawadhatng|gokishawadhatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawadhatya|shawadhatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawadhatnkya|goshawadhatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawadhatya|gokishawadhatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawadhatyam|shawadhatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawadhatnkyam|goshawadhatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawadhatyam|gokishawadhatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawadhatnĂŒshĂ«|shawadhatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawadhatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawadhatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawadhatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawadhatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawadhatnĂŒro|shawadhatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawadhatnknĂŒro|goshawadhatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawadhatnĂŒro|gokishawadhatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawadhatnĂŒmu|shawadhatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawadhatnknĂŒmu|goshawadhatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawadhatnĂŒmu|gokishawadhatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawadhatshĂ«nĂŒ|shawadhatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawadhatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawadhatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawadhatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawadhatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawadhatshĂ«ro|shawadhatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawadhatnkshĂ«ro|goshawadhatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawadhatshĂ«ro|gokishawadhatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawadhatshĂ«mu|shawadhatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawadhatnkshĂ«mu|goshawadhatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawadhatshĂ«mu|gokishawadhatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawadhatronĂŒ|shawadhatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawadhatnkronĂŒ|goshawadhatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawadhatronĂŒ|gokishawadhatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawadhatroshĂ«|shawadhatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawadhatnkroshĂ«|goshawadhatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawadhatroshĂ«|gokishawadhatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawadhatromu|shawadhatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawadhatnkromu|goshawadhatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawadhatromu|gokishawadhatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawadhatmunĂŒ|shawadhatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawadhatnkmunĂŒ|goshawadhatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawadhatmunĂŒ|gokishawadhatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawadhatmushĂ«|shawadhatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawadhatnkmushĂ«|goshawadhatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawadhatmushĂ«|gokishawadhatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawadhatmuro|shawadhatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawadhatnkmuro|goshawadhatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawadhatmuro|gokishawadhatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
